biological_replicate: a S. islandicus strain encoding a chromosomally-coded N-terminal 6 × His-tagged SisPINA was constructed
technical_replicate: pull-down and gel filtration chromatography experiments
To verify the physical interaction between SisPINA and Hjm, pull-down and gel filtration chromatography experiments were conducted
experimental_design: interaction study of SisPINA, Hjm, and Hjc
Our results collectively suggest that SisPINA, Hjm and Hjc work together to function in replication fork regression, HJ formation and HJ cleavage.
factor_value: SisPINA, Hjm and Hjc work together
number_of_technical_replicates: pull-down and gel filtration chromatography experiments
